plans.name: Full Condensed Recorded OET Course — Medicine
plans.description: The flagship recorded course. Complete, condensed, exam-focused training across Listening, Reading, Writing and Speaking for Medicine candidates. Completable in roughly 10 days of focused study, with full freedom to repeat any lesson during the 6-month access window.
comparisonFeatures: 160+ Listening exams (including exams beyond Jahshan/Benchmark)
100+ Reading exams with answer keys and rationales
90+ Writing tasks covering all main letter types
100+ Speaking cards across scenarios and card types
Recent recall updates plus old recalls from 2023 onwards
Bonuses: 5 Writing letter assessments, 1 private Speaking session, 5 AI credits
Continuous Q&A support during the access period

plans.name: Full Condensed Recorded Course + The Tutor Book
plans.description: Same flagship Medicine course bundled with The Tutor Book — First Edition 2026. Recommended for candidates who want recall-based written practice alongside the recorded training.
comparisonFeatures: Everything in Full Condensed Recorded Course (£100)
The Tutor Book — First Edition 2026 (watermarked PDF, personalised)
Private Telegram channel access for book updates
Continuous book + recall updates

plans.name: Full Nursing OET Course
plans.description: Profession-specific OET preparation for nurses. Covers all four sub-tests with nursing-specific Writing letters (referral, discharge, transfer, update, incident-related) and nursing Speaking scenarios. Base SKU without bundled assessments or AI credits.
comparisonFeatures: Full Nursing OET course (Listening, Reading, Writing, Speaking)
Recall-based Nursing Writing letters and model answers
Recall-based Nursing Speaking cards with expected ideas
Listening + Reading practice library
Continuous Q&A support during the access period

plans.name: Nursing Course + Assessment Package
plans.description: Full Nursing course with 5 Writing letter assessments and 5 free AI credits bundled. The sweet-spot SKU for nurses who want personalised Writing feedback.
comparisonFeatures: Everything in Full Nursing OET Course (£60)
5 Writing letter assessments (48–72h turnaround, Friday off)
Detailed correction + voice-note feedback via WhatsApp
5 free AI credits for instant practice feedback

plans.name: Nursing Premium Bundle
plans.description: Top Nursing SKU: full course, 5 Writing assessments, 5 AI credits, and the Basic English foundation course for candidates who need to strengthen English before OET-specific training.
comparisonFeatures: Everything in Nursing Course + Assessment Package (£70)
Basic English Course Preparation for OET (11+ hours)
Foundation grammar, vocabulary and sentence-formation training
Course booklet for the Basic English module

plans.name: Full Pharmacy OET Course
plans.description: Profession-specific OET preparation for pharmacists. Covers all four sub-tests with pharmacy Writing (complaint, dosage, drug safety, expiry-date discrepancy, interactions, counselling) and pharmacy Speaking (community + hospital scenarios). Price provisional — confirm before public launch.
comparisonFeatures: Full Pharmacy OET course (Listening, Reading, Writing, Speaking)
Pharmacy-specific Writing examples and model answers
Pharmacy Speaking cards with expected ideas and language
Recall-based practice resources
Continuous Q&A support during the access period

plans.name: Basic English Course — Preparation for OET
plans.description: Foundation English course for candidates at Beginner / A1 / A2 / B1 level aiming to reach B1–B2 before starting intensive OET preparation. Covers essential grammar, medical vocabulary, sentence formation, listening foundations and a study plan.
comparisonFeatures: Fully recorded preparatory English course
Essential grammar from zero, framed around OET production
Medical and healthcare vocabulary base
Sentence formation for OET-style communication
Conversation and listening foundations for healthcare
Course booklet for simplified, smooth explanations
Full study plan

plans.name: Full Crash Course — General OET
plans.description: Condensed, high-impact OET preparation for candidates with limited time before the exam. Covers all four sub-tests in an exam-oriented format with high-yield strategies and recall-based guidance.
comparisonFeatures: Condensed recorded course across the four sub-tests
High-yield strategies and practical techniques
Recall-based guidance
Selected study materials and Listening recalls

plans.name: Full Crash Course + 3 Writing Assessments
plans.description: Full Crash Course bundled with assessment of 3 Writing letters. Personalised correction with estimated score and voice-note feedback.
comparisonFeatures: Everything in Full Crash Course (£60)
Assessment of 3 Writing letters
Estimated score, detailed correction, voice-note feedback
Letters can be candidate-chosen or recall-recommended

plans.name: Full Crash Course + 5 Writing Assessments

comparisonFeatures: Everything in Full Crash Course (£60)
Assessment of 5 Writing letters
Estimated score, detailed correction, voice-note feedback
Letters can be candidate-chosen or recall-recommended

plans.name: Recorded Writing Crash Course
plans.description: Standalone recorded Writing course. Full A-to-Z explanation: task analysis, introductions, body, closing paragraphs, all letter types, latest assessment criteria, and profession-specific examples.
comparisonFeatures: Full recorded Writing explanation (A–Z)
Task, purpose, audience, case-note relevance
Referral, discharge, transfer, update, complaint and profession-specific letters
Grammar, sentence structure, clarity, conciseness
Latest OET Writing assessment criteria
Profession-specific examples + recall-based ideas

comparisonFeatures: Everything in Writing Crash Course (£35)
2 Writing letter assessments

plans.name: Recorded Speaking Crash Course

All major card types covered in detail
Recall-based focus on most repeated card types
Opening, information gathering, addressing concerns, closing safely
Handling anxious, angry, confused, reluctant or non-compliant patients
Empathy, reassurance, signposting, checking understanding

plans.name: 1 Private Speaking Assessment Session
plans.description: One-to-one Speaking practice with different cards and detailed feedback. Suitable as a top-up alongside any course.
comparisonFeatures: Live 1:1 Speaking session
Multiple cards covered
Detailed performance feedback

plans.name: 2 Private Speaking Assessment Sessions
plans.description: Two one-to-one Speaking assessment sessions.
comparisonFeatures: 2 Live 1:1 Speaking sessions
Different cards each session
Detailed performance feedback each session

plans.name: Double Special Package — Writing + Speaking
plans.description: Two full standalone courses bundled: Writing (A–Z) and Speaking (A–Z). Suitable for candidates strong in Listening and Reading who want to focus on the two productive sub-tests. Candidates can add both Writing letter assessments (3 / 5 / 7 / 10) and extra private Speaking sessions as add-ons.
comparisonFeatures: Full recorded Writing course (latest criteria)
Full recorded Speaking course (A–Z)

plans.name: Mega Special Package
plans.description: Flagship combo. Full Writing course (latest criteria), full Speaking course (A–Z), one private Speaking session, and 5 Writing letter assessments. The most complete package for the two productive sub-tests.
comparisonFeatures: Full recorded Writing sessions (latest criteria)
Full recorded Speaking course (A–Z)
1 Private Speaking session
5 Writing letter assessments
18+ hours of focused Writing and Speaking preparation

plans.name: The Tutor Book — First Edition 2026
plans.description: Recall-based OET preparation book built around 2025–2026 trends and real exam recalls. Covers all four sub-tests with new Listening recalls, recall-based Reading topics, 8 full Writing letters with model answers, and 16 recall-based Speaking cards.
comparisonFeatures: Listening: new recalls, full audio scripts, answers, clear justifications
Reading: recall-based topics, vocab trends, strategies for Parts A, B, C
Writing: 8 full recall-based letters with model answers and structure guidance
Speaking: 16 recall-based cards based on recent scenarios
Private Telegram channel access for continuous updates

addOns.name: 3 Writing Letter Assessments — Add-on
addOns.description: Stackable add-on. Adds 3 writing letter assessments to a candidate already enrolled in a writing-add-on-eligible course.

addOns.name: 5 Writing Letter Assessments — Add-on
addOns.description: Stackable add-on. Adds 5 writing letter assessments to an existing eligible enrolment.

addOns.name: 7 Writing Letter Assessments — Add-on
addOns.description: Stackable add-on. Adds 7 writing letter assessments.

addOns.name: 10 Writing Letter Assessments — Add-on
addOns.description: Stackable add-on. Adds 10 writing letter assessments — best value per letter.

addOns.name: 1 Private Speaking Assessment Session — Add-on
addOns.description: Extra private 1:1 Speaking session added to an eligible parent enrolment.

addOns.name: 2 Private Speaking Assessment Sessions — Add-on
addOns.description: Two extra private 1:1 Speaking sessions added to an eligible parent enrolment.

addOns.name: The Tutor Book — Add-on Price (Enrolled Students)
addOns.description: Discounted Tutor Book SKU available only to candidates with an active eligible enrolment where tutor_book_discount=true.

addOns.name: Quick Check
addOns.description: One-off AI grading package for targeted OET readiness checks. Grants 5 grading credits with 30-day validity.

addOns.name: Exam Prep Pro
addOns.description: One-off exam preparation package. Grants 15 grading credits, 2 mock entitlements, and 90-day validity.

addOns.name: OET Mastery
addOns.description: One-off mastery package. Grants 30 grading credits, 5 mock entitlements, 180-day validity, and priority queue access.

addOns.name: Listening Starter
addOns.description: 5 Listening practice tests with deterministic answer-key marking. Listening practice is always free to grade — this pack curates a focused starter set. 30-day validity.

addOns.name: Listening Standard
addOns.description: 15 Listening practice tests with instant answer-key marking. 90-day validity.

addOns.name: Listening Pro
addOns.description: Unlimited Listening practice tests for 6 months. Deterministic answer-key marking, no AI credits required.

addOns.name: Reading Starter
addOns.description: 5 Reading practice tests with deterministic answer-key marking. Reading practice is always free to grade — this pack curates a focused starter set. 30-day validity.

addOns.name: Reading Standard
addOns.description: 15 Reading practice tests with instant answer-key marking. 90-day validity.

addOns.name: Reading Pro
addOns.description: Unlimited Reading practice tests for 6 months. Deterministic answer-key marking, no AI credits required.

addOns.name: Writing Starter
addOns.description: 3 AI grading credits sized for Writing practice — enough for 3 AI-graded Writing letters (Claude). 30-day validity.

addOns.name: Writing Standard
addOns.description: 8 AI grading credits sized for Writing practice — enough for 8 AI-graded Writing letters (Claude). 90-day validity.

addOns.name: Writing Pro
addOns.description: 15 AI grading credits sized for Writing practice — enough for 15 AI-graded Writing letters (Claude). 6-month validity.

addOns.name: Speaking Starter
addOns.description: 3 AI grading credits sized for Speaking practice — enough for 3 AI-graded Speaking cards (Whisper + Claude). 30-day validity.

addOns.name: Speaking Standard
addOns.description: 8 AI grading credits sized for Speaking practice — enough for 8 AI-graded Speaking cards (Whisper + Claude). 90-day validity.

addOns.name: Speaking Pro
addOns.description: 15 AI grading credits sized for Speaking practice — enough for 15 AI-graded Speaking cards (Whisper + Claude). 6-month validity.

addOns.name: 1 Full Mock
addOns.description: 1 full OET mock exam covering all 4 subtests. Writing + Speaking are AI-graded; Listening + Reading are auto-marked. Mock allowances are separate from AI credits. 6-month validity.

addOns.name: 3 Full Mocks
addOns.description: 3 full OET mock exams covering all 4 subtests each. Writing + Speaking are AI-graded; Listening + Reading are auto-marked. Mock allowances are separate from AI credits. 6-month validity.

addOns.name: 5 Full Mocks
addOns.description: 5 full OET mock exams covering all 4 subtests each. Writing + Speaking are AI-graded; Listening + Reading are auto-marked. Mock allowances are separate from AI credits. 6-month validity.
